notes:
You have to set the "Launch Options" in the Steam Properties for this Game to "-hostx=23.239.17.171" then you can login an play like on Windows ...
The Game is not listed in the Steam Search anymore. You can get it through this link: https://store.steampowered.com/app/17080/Tribes_Ascend/
Hopefully there will be more players in the near future again ...
